items.summary: Fix the backend query so that the admin can retrieve all appointment requests. Ensure the appointment listing function returns all appointments (including pending ones) when called by an authenticated admin, and that the access control check correctly identifies admin callers.

Fix the backend query so that the admin can retrieve all feedback submissions. Ensure the feedback listing function returns all feedback entries (including unapproved/pending ones) when called by an authenticated admin, and that the access control check correctly identifies admin callers.

Fix the admin dashboard frontend so that the Appointments tab correctly fetches and displays all appointment requests from the backend. Ensure the React Query hook used for listing appointments passes the correct admin credentials/actor and handles loading, empty, and error states gracefully.

Fix the admin dashboard frontend so that the Feedback tab correctly fetches and displays all feedback submissions from the backend. Ensure the React Query hook used for listing feedback passes the correct admin credentials/actor and handles loading, empty, and error states gracefully.
